moduleDescription: This module contains code for generating volatile loads and stores, which are useful in embedded and systems programming.

entries.name: volatileLoad
entries.code: proc volatileLoad[T](src: ptr T): T {.inline, noinit.}
entries.description: Generates a volatile load of the value stored in the container src. Note that this only effects code generation on C like backends.

entries.name: volatileStore
entries.code: proc volatileStore[T](dest: ptr T; val: T) {.inline.}
entries.description: Generates a volatile store into the container dest of the value val. Note that this only effects code generation on C like backends.
